name: Hardware Compatibility Report

labels: hardware-compatibility

## Hardware Details

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| MacBook model | MacBook Pro ___ (year) |
| Identifier | A____ |
| CPU | Intel Core ___ |
| GPU | Intel ___ + AMD/NVIDIA ___ |
| RAM | ___ GB |
| Storage | ___ GB NVMe |
| WLAN chip | Broadcom BCM____ |
| T2 chip | Yes / No |

## Software Details

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Ubuntu version | 24.04 / other: ___ |
| Kernel version | Output of `uname -r` |
| Installation type | Single-boot / Dual-boot |

| Component | Status | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| WLAN | ✅ / ⚠️ / ❌ | |
| Bluetooth | ✅ / ⚠️ / ❌ | |
| Keyboard | ✅ / ⚠️ / ❌ | |
| Trackpad | ✅ / ⚠️ / ❌ | |

| Audio | ✅ / ⚠️ / ❌ | |
| GPU | ✅ / ⚠️ / ❌ | |
| Suspend/Resume | ✅ / ⚠️ / ❌ | |
| Thunderbolt | ✅ / ⚠️ / ❌ | |
| Fan control | ✅ / ⚠️ / ❌ | |
